title: SoundAddons
description: A Hypixel Skyblock sound modification texture pack addon, this pack reduces the sounds of certain annoying/load noises.
body:
A Hypixel Skyblock sound modification texture pack addon, this pack reduces the sounds of certain annoying/load noises.

Reduced sounds:
- Enderman death
- AOTV teleport
- Bonzo staff
- Hyperion explosions
- Thunder and Lightning effects

Also replaces the wither impact sound with a custom one, let me know if you want any other sounds added or reccomendations.
